SubLayerProcessing.SQLScript:
select 
  a.* 
 ,base64(concat( 
 IfNull(StatisticsID,""),"|", 
 IfNull(ReviewTypeID,""),"|", 
 IfNull(ReviewTypeDescription,""),"|", 
 IfNull(PlanMemberID,""),"|", 
 IfNull(ProviderID,""),"|", 
 IfNull(SuspectFor,""),"|", 
 IfNull(HCC,""),"|", 
 IfNull(HCCGroup,""),"|", 
 IfNull(RuleUsed,""),"|", 
 IfNull(SuspectType,""),"|", 
 IfNull(InsertedDate,""),"|", 
 IfNull(Weight,""),"|", 
 IfNull(RAF,""),"|", 
 IfNull(cast(IsSuspect as string),""),"|", 
 IfNull(WeightDesc,""),"|", 
 IfNull(RAGain,""),"|", 
 IfNull(TrumpingHCC,""),"|", 
 IfNull(BaseRate,""),"|", 
 IfNull(DiseaseSuspectPriority,""),"|", 
 IfNull(RecordType,""),"|", 
 IfNull(DOSYear,""),"|", 
 IfNull(EvidenceType,""),"|", 
 IfNull(EvidenceValue,""),"|", 
 IfNull(EvidenceResult,""),"|", 
 IfNull(EvidenceDate,"") 
 )) as HashKey 
 from 
 ( 
 select distinct 
  Suspect.StatisticsID 
 ,Suspect.ReviewTypeID 
 ,ReviewType.Description as ReviewTypeDescription 
 ,MemberMaster.MemberID as PlanMemberID 
 ,ProviderMaster.ProviderID 
 ,Suspect.SuspectFor 
 ,Suspect.HCC 
 ,Suspect.HCCGroup 
 ,Suspect.RuleUsed 
 ,Suspect.SuspectType 
 ,Suspect.InsertedDate 
 ,Suspect.Weight 
 ,Suspect.RAF 
 ,Suspect.IsSuspect 
 ,Suspect.WeightDesc 
 ,Suspect.RAGain 
 ,Suspect.TrumpingHCC 
 ,Suspect.BaseRate 
 ,Suspect.DiseaseSuspectPriority 
 ,Suspect.RecordType 
 ,Suspect.DOSYear 
 ,Suspect.EvidenceType 
 ,Suspect.EvidenceValue 
 ,Suspect.EvidenceResult 
 ,Suspect.EvidenceDate 
  
 from Suspect  
 left join  MemberMaster on Suspect.MemberMaster_WK = MemberMaster.MemberMaster_WK 
 left join ProviderMaster on Suspect.ProviderMaster_WK = ProviderMaster.ProviderMaster_WK 
 left join ReviewType on Suspect.ReviewTypeID = ReviewType.ReviewTypeID 
 )a
SubLayerProcessing.MergeScript:
MERGE INTO DestinationTable t 
 USING 
 ( 
 SELECT 
  ss.StatisticsID 
 ,ss.ReviewTypeID 
 ,ss.ReviewTypeDescription 
 ,ss.PlanMemberID 
 ,ss.ProviderID 
 ,ss.SuspectFor 
 ,ss.HCC 
 ,ss.HCCGroup 
 ,ss.RuleUsed 
 ,ss.SuspectType 
 ,ss.InsertedDate 
 ,ss.Weight 
 ,ss.RAF 
 ,ss.IsSuspect 
 ,ss.WeightDesc 
 ,ss.RAGain 
 ,ss.TrumpingHCC 
 ,ss.BaseRate 
 ,ss.DiseaseSuspectPriority 
 ,ss.RecordType 
 ,ss.DOSYear 
 ,ss.EvidenceType 
 ,ss.EvidenceValue 
 ,ss.EvidenceResult 
 ,ss.EvidenceDate 
 ,ss.HashKey 
 ,ifnull(ss.HashKey,dt.HashKey) as merge_HashKey 
  
 FROM tempSQLScript ss 
 FULL OUTER JOIN DestinationTable dt 
 on  ss.HashKey = dt.HashKey 
 )s 
 ON s.merge_HashKey = t.HashKey 
 WHEN MATCHED AND s.hashKey is null THEN DELETE 
 WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT 
 ( 
  StatisticsID 
 ,ReviewTypeID 
 ,ReviewTypeDescription 
 ,PlanMemberID 
 ,ProviderID 
 ,SuspectFor 
 ,HCC 
 ,HCCGroup 
 ,RuleUsed 
 ,SuspectType 
 ,InsertedDate 
 ,Weight 
 ,RAF 
 ,IsSuspect 
 ,WeightDesc 
 ,RAGain 
 ,TrumpingHCC 
 ,BaseRate 
 ,DiseaseSuspectPriority 
 ,RecordType 
 ,DOSYear 
 ,EvidenceType 
 ,EvidenceValue 
 ,EvidenceResult 
 ,EvidenceDate 
 ,HashKey 
 ) 
 VALUES 
 ( 
  s.StatisticsID 
 ,s.ReviewTypeID 
 ,s.ReviewTypeDescription 
 ,s.PlanMemberID 
 ,s.ProviderID 
 ,s.SuspectFor 
 ,s.HCC 
 ,s.HCCGroup 
 ,s.RuleUsed 
 ,s.SuspectType 
 ,s.InsertedDate 
 ,s.Weight 
 ,s.RAF 
 ,s.IsSuspect 
 ,s.WeightDesc 
 ,s.RAGain 
 ,s.TrumpingHCC 
 ,s.BaseRate 
 ,s.DiseaseSuspectPriority 
 ,s.RecordType 
 ,s.DOSYear 
 ,s.EvidenceType 
 ,s.EvidenceValue 
 ,s.EvidenceResult 
 ,s.EvidenceDate 
 ,s.HashKey 
 )
